title: Eagle (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Eagle''''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They attempted to stop the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Ashanti]]'' from stealing [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from a secret Imperial base. However the corvettes were destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] ace [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
